Solution

## Prevent Cascading Failures with Right Protection Coordination

Care Labs’ relay coordination study aims at making your electrical system stable. We check whether the protective relays are working in coordination and recommend the right strategy for timely fault isolation. Minimize downtime with value-enhancing insights with ETAP protection coordination.

Support

## All-inclusive Support For Electrical Protection Coordination

Get an in-depth analysis done for relay coordination with Care Labs. We help companies in Thailand implement strategies for isolating any faults in their power system with detailed and compliant coordination studies.

Technical Support:

We have the right skill set and advanced technology like ETAP to give your power system the best makeover.

Safety And Compliance Support:

Our solutions help establish electrical safety and compliance with standard guidelines from IEEE, IEC, and so on.

Technology

## Electrical Coordination Study With ETAP

Ensure operational continuity in your facility with Thailabs’ top relay coordination study services by Care Labs. Grab the opportunity to partner with Care Labs to optimize the relay settings using the ETAP software suite. Let us help you protect your system from escalating faults.

System

## Critical Equipment for Protection System Coordination

We analyze all the main electrical equipment in a facility to understand the impact of relay coordination.
